name: HyperPay Open Payment Platform API
description: The Open Payment Platform (OPP) API by HyperPay provides a server-to-server payment integration supporting credit/debit cards, digital wallets, bank transfers, and various alternative payment methods. Supports pre-authorization, debit, credit, capture, reversal, and refund operations.
